title: Ginger Ray Advent Scene Box Kit Make Your Own Christmas 24 Boxes & 12 Characters
features: Countdown to Christmas with these stunning advent calendar boxes, fill them with treats for the little ones to open up each day.
Each pack contains: 24 x Christmas advent boxes, 12 x stand up characters, 1 x number sticker sheets and 24 x twine.
description: Product Description Countdown to Christmas with these stunning DIY advent calendar boxes, fill them with treats for the little ones to open up each day. Easy and fun to assemble, display these Christmas boxes across your mantlepiece or hang them from your tree for the whole family to enjoy. This kit comes with adorable illustrative characters to complete your festive display. Each pack contains: 24 x Christmas boxes, 12 x stand up characters, 1 x number sticker sheets and 24 x pieces of cut twine. Product and Packaging is recyclable and FSC certfied. Safety Warning Decorative warning (Multi language)
